zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Adams於1531年1月21日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛時，他的父親John Adams29歲，母親Margery Alice Squire26歲。他於1554年8月22日與Rose Alice Stebbing在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1586年在英國薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛被列為tithingman. a parish officer elected annually to preserve good order in the church during divine service, to make complaint of any disorderly conduct, and to enforce the observance of the sabbath.。他去世於1596年8月12日在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Adams于1531年1月21日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛时，他的父亲John Adams29岁，母亲Margery Alice Squire26岁。他于1554年8月22日与Rose Alice Stebbing在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1586年在英国薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛被列为tithingman. a parish officer elected annually to preserve good order in the church during divine service, to make complaint of any disorderly conduct, and to enforce the observance of the sabbath.。他去世于1596年8月12日在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Umberto, Aldo, Giulio, Paolo, Primo, Silvio.
German: Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name Adam , from Adami, the Latin genitive. This surname is also found in France (Lorraine).
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name   Adamo  . This surname is also found in Corsica and southern France.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Adams was born on 21 January 1531, in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Adams, was 29 and his mother, Margery Alice Squire, was 26. He married Rose Alice Stebbing on 22 August 1554, in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. In 1586, at the age of 55, his occupation is listed as tithingman. a parish officer elected annually to preserve good order in the church during divine service, to make complaint of any disorderly conduct, and to enforce the observance of the sabbath. in Barton St David, Somerset, England. He died on 12 August 1596, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Barton St David, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Adams est né le 21 janvier 1531, à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Adams, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margery Alice Squire, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Rose Alice Stebbing le 22 août 1554, à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. En 1586, à l’âge de 55 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est tithingman. a parish officer elected annually to preserve good order in the church during divine service, to make complaint of any disorderly conduct, and to enforce the observance of the sabbath. à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 12 août 1596, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Adams am 21. Januar 1531 in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Adams 29 und seine Mutter Margery Alice Squire 26. Er hat am 22. August 1554 in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Rose Alice Stebbing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1586, als er 55 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als tithingman. a parish officer elected annually to preserve good order in the church during divine service, to make complaint of any disorderly conduct, and to enforce the observance of the sabbath. in Barton St David, Somerset, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. August 1596 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Barton St David, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Adams è nato il il 21 gennaio 1531 nel Barton St David, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Adams, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margery Alice Squire, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Rose Alice Stebbing il 22 agosto 1554, nel Barton St David, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1586, all'età di 55 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come tithingman. a parish officer elected annually to preserve good order in the church during divine service, to make complaint of any disorderly conduct, and to enforce the observance of the sabbath. nel Barton St David, Somerset, England. Morì il 12 agosto 1596, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Barton St David, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Adamsが1531年1月21日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトバートン スト ダヴィドで生まれた時，父John Adamsは29歳，母Margery Alice Squireは26歳であった。1554年8月22日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトバートン スト ダヴィドでRose Alice Stebbingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1586年，55歳の時，イギリスソメルセトバートン スト ダヴィドでの職業はtithingman. a parish officer elected annually to preserve good order in the church during divine service, to make complaint of any disorderly conduct, and to enforce the observance of the sabbath.と記録されている。彼は1596年8月12日に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトバートン スト ダヴィドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Adams(이)가 1531년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Adams(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Alice Squire(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1554년 8월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 Rose Alice Stebbing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1586년, 55세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 tithingman. a parish officer elected annually to preserve good order in the church during divine service, to make complaint of any disorderly conduct, and to enforce the observance of the sabbath.이었다. 그는 1596년 8월 12일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에 묻혔다.

pt.Barton St David, Somersetshire, England: Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Adams nasceu em 21 de janeiro de 1531, em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Adams, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margery Alice Squire, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Rose Alice Stebbing em 22 de agosto de 1554, em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1586, com 55 anos, sua profissão aparece como tithingman. a parish officer elected annually to preserve good order in the church during divine service, to make complaint of any disorderly conduct, and to enforce the observance of the sabbath. em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1596, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.Barton St David, Somersetshire, England: бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Adams родился 21 января 1531 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Adams было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Alice Squire, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Rose Alice Stebbing 22 августа 1554 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1586 году, в возрасте 55 лет,  он работал по профессии tithingman. a parish officer elected annually to preserve good order in the church during divine service, to make complaint of any disorderly conduct, and to enforce the observance of the sabbath. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия. Он умер 12 августа 1596 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия.

es.Barton St David, Somerset, England, Unit: Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Barton St David, Somersetshire, England: Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Adams nació el 21 de enero de 1531, en Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Adams, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margery Alice Squire, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Rose Alice Stebbing el 22 de agosto de 1554, en Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. En 1586, a la edad de 55 años, su ocupación registrada era tithingman. a parish officer elected annually to preserve good order in the church during divine service, to make complaint of any disorderly conduct, and to enforce the observance of the sabbath. en Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1596, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra.
